text:
is the mother of Sasha Blouse and the wife of Artur Blouse.

Appearance

Lisa has dark hair tied in a bun. When she visited Sasha's grave she wore black clothing.

Personality

From what is seen, Lisa is a very kind, affectionate woman. When Gabi and Falco first arrive, she attempts to affectionately nuzzle Gabi's hair, and although Gabi swats her hand away, it does not upset her, understanding that Gabi must have been through a lot. She cares about her family very much, and was deeply saddened by Sasha's death.

Like her husband, Lisa is very selfless; upon discovering that Gabi is responsible for killing Sasha, she decides to let go of her pain and hatred to forgive Gabi, telling Niccolo to let go of Falco.

Story

War for Paradis arc

Lisa Blouse and her husband go to their daughter's grave and mourn her.

Kaya brings two young runaways to the Blouse family's farm, and Lisa and her husband agree to give the children food. As she is serving the food, Lisa tries to be friendly with one of the children, but is spurned for her efforts. Assuming the child has been traumatized by something, Lisa elects to give her space.

Along with her husband and the children, Lisa goes to Niccolo's restaurant, telling the kids to eat a lot. Later, Niccolo tells them Mia is the one who murdered Sasha and offers Mr. Blouse an opportunity to avenge her. The latter takes the knife that was handed to him and, explaining his reasons for not taking it, he hands the knife to Lisa. Following her husband's words, she puts the knife on the table and tells Niccolo to release an unconscious Ben. She checks him then restrains Kaya from stabbing Mia, understanding and sharing her sorrow.

Later, when the Yeagerists arrive to the restaurant, Lisa and the rest of the Blouse family are taken captive along with the Survey Corps members present. They are taken to Shiganshina, where the entire group is imprisoned in the district's military headquarters. As the fight on the prison's rooftop ensues, Lisa and the other prisoners wonder what the sound overhead them was about.

Onyankopon releases the prisoners from their cell and Jean Kirstein orders Niccolo to keep the Blouse family safe. Niccolo escorts the Blouse family through Shiganshina, leading them to a house in a relatively safe section where they can stay until the fighting is over. Lisa expresses concern over Mia and Ben, though Mr. Blouse assures her that the two will be fine.

The family takes refuge in an abandoned building, but are forced to flee when they are found by a Pure Titan. Kaya trips and gets separated from the group, but is saved by the timely arrival of Mia, who explains that she has returned to rescue Falco. While Lisa comforts Kaya, the group is found by a group of soldiers who agree to escort them to the safety of the military's headquarters.

Later on in the military headquarters, the Blouse family bid farewell to Gabi, who plans to leave for Ragako with Armin Arlert to save Falco. 

Three years after the Rumbling and Eren Yeager's death, Lisa and her family, alongside Niccolo, are seen walking by a Yeagerist ceremony.

Triva

Lisa shares a birthday with Ackerman and Yelena.
